decision_summary: Approve v8.6 as a Provider Execution Approval Bridge release, provided production provider execution remains out of scope.
rationale: The bridge turns provider side-effect permission into explicit preflight evidence instead of inheriting authority from adapter readiness or pilot simulation.
recommendation: Ship after provider-execution-approval-audit, release-state-audit, npm test, smoke, and GitHub Actions are green.
expected_user_reaction: The operator should see that v8.6 adds approval readiness, not real provider execution.
artifact_change_recommendations: Expose approval bridge status in Mission Control.
Keep not-proven boundaries explicit in release notes.
organization_change_recommendations: Require approval bridge evidence before any future provider execution task can claim external side-effect permission.
